title: Short Sale Questionnaire
description: Answer these questions to create the short-sale seller document checklist. Agents prepare and send forms in their e-sign system, then upload signed copies here.

questions.label: Was the property built before 1978?
questions.help_text: Lead-based paint disclosure is required for properties built before 1978.

questions.label: Is the property subject to an owner's association?
Is the property located in a special taxing or assessment district?
Is the property in a flood hazard area?
Does this property have a septic system or on-site sewer facility?
Are there multiple lienholders or servicers that must approve the sale?
Will another party get a referral fee from you for this transaction?
Does your seller have a copy of their survey?

document_rules.name: Residential Real Estate Listing Agreement
document_rules.reason: Required for short sale seller transactions

document_rules.name: Seller's Disclosure Notice
document_rules.reason: Commonly needed for short sale seller transactions

document_rules.name: Seller's Estimated Net Proceeds
document_rules.reason: Required to estimate short sale deficiency and payoff needs

document_rules.name: Short Sale Addendum
document_rules.reason: Required when sale is subject to lienholder approval

document_rules.name: Seller Hardship / Financial Package
document_rules.reason: Common lender requirement for short sale approval

document_rules.name: Multiple Lienholder Approval Package
document_rules.reason: Multiple lienholders or servicers must approve the sale

document_rules.name: Addendum for Seller's Disclosure of Information on Lead-Based Paint
Addendum for Property Subject to Mandatory Membership in Owners' Association
Notice to Purchaser of Real Property Located in a Special Taxing or Assessment District
document_rules.reason: Property in special taxing or assessment district

document_rules.name: Information About Special Flood Hazard Areas
Information About On-Site Sewer Facility
document_rules.reason: Property has septic system or on-site sewage facility

document_rules.name: T-47.1 Residential Real Property Affidavit
document_rules.reason: Seller has survey or is unsure
